name: AI网文创作
examples_zh: 帮我为一部都市修仙网文设计新书设定、大纲和前三十章节奏表，避免战力体系前后冲突
检查我这条双主角复仇线的伏笔清单，标出人物动机、时间线和回收章节的矛盾点
根据读者评论总结爽点、弃书点和CP偏好，并调整下一卷剧情节奏
examples_en: Plan a new urban cultivation web novel with worldbuilding, arc outline, and pacing for the first 30 chapters while avoiding power-system conflicts
Audit my dual-protagonist revenge subplot for foreshadowing, character motivation, timeline, and payoff conflicts
Analyze reader comments to identify satisfaction points, drop-off reasons, and romance preferences, then adjust the next volume outline
